rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the target component type or implementation scope as appropriate
Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting annex blocks
Use valid component type scopes for component port references
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings after subcomponents and connections
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity when fusing AGREE contracts
Preserve existing component type and implementation structures
Ensure annex blocks are placed in valid scopes for their references
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Component type annexes contain assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not place subcomponent port references in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without proper exposure
